title: rework camera controls, scene angles & figure interaction
description:
## Summary

- **RMB drag = orbit** (was pan); hold RMB + WASD = free camera steering (A/D rotates, W/S tilts)
- **Touch/Android**: 1-finger on empty board = orbit; 2-finger = pan + pinch-zoom
- **All 6 camera presets redesigned** with practical angles for constellation-board work; default phi lowered from 0.95 → 0.65 (less tilted)
- **Figure interaction improved**: clicking a figure in orbit/pan tool auto-switches to select; selected figure shows inline POV + 45° rotation buttons; context menu has direct rotation actions instead of tool-switch
- **Stale Brett-v2 admin page removed**: nav entry + `admin/brett.astro` deleted (was fetching non-existent `brett-v2.html`)

## Preset angles (new)

| # | Name | φ (elevation) | Notes |
|---|------|--------------|-------|
| 1 | Draufsicht | 0.12 | Near top-down, full overview |
| 2 | Vorderseite | 1.10 | Front-edge, like standing at the table |
| 3 | Links | 0.85 | Left side, comfortable angle |
| 4 | Rechts | 0.85 | Right side |
| 5 | Standard | 0.65 | New home/default |
| 6 | Hoch | 0.38 | High bird's-eye with depth |

## Test plan

- [ ] Open `brett.mentolder.de` — board loads at less-steep angle (Standard preset)
- [ ] Hold RMB and drag — camera orbits (not pans)
- [ ] Hold RMB + press A/D — camera rotates; W/S tilts
- [ ] Press keys 1–6 — preset names and angles match table above
- [ ] Click a figure while in O-tool — auto-switches to V and selects the figure
- [ ] Select a figure — inline 👁 Sicht / ↺ / ↻ buttons appear at bottom-left
- [ ] Right-click a figure — menu shows ↺ 45° links / ↻ 45° rechts (immediate rotation)
- [ ] Touch: 1-finger drag on empty board = orbit; 2-finger = pan + zoom
- [ ] Admin sidebar — no "Brett v2" entry visible
- [ ] `/admin/brett` — 404 (page deleted)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
